issues.note: Doc type is malformed — missing parentheses around the union. Source expands to ('start' | 'center' | 'end')[]. Doc representation '"start' | 'center' | 'end'[]' is ambiguous and incorrectly implies only 'end' is arrayed.

description_pairs.source_description: Renders a data table from a 2D string array, with optional legend markers (disk or tick) and per-column alignment. Legend is shown below the table unless hideLegend is set. Caption is used as an accessible aria-label.
description_pairs.doc_description: Table component for page-constructor that renders data tables with optional legend markers.

description_pairs.source_description: Renders a title and optional subtitle wrapped in a responsive grid column. Accepts a title as a plain string or a TitleItemProps object. Column sizes default to {all: 12, sm: 8}. Supports an id for anchor linking.
description_pairs.doc_description: Title component for page-constructor that renders a title with optional subtitle and supports various text sizes.
